Index

A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I | L | M | N | O | P | R | S | T | U | V | W | X

A

  • anchor (xyzrender.types.VectorArrow attribute)
  • annotations (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • apply_hydrogen_flags() (in module xyzrender.config)
  • atom_cmap (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • atom_scale (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • atom_stroke_color (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • atom_stroke_width (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • auto_orient (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • axis_colors (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • axis_width_scale (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

B

  • b (xyzrender.types.Color attribute)
  • background (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • blend() (xyzrender.types.Color method)
  • blur_sigma (xyzrender.types.MOParams attribute)
  • bond_color (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • bond_gap (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • bond_orders (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • bond_width (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • BondStyle (class in xyzrender.types)
  • build_config() (in module xyzrender.config)
  • build_render_config() (in module xyzrender.config)
  • build_surface_params() (in module xyzrender.config)

C

  • canvas_size (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cbar (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cell_color (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

    • (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cell_line_width (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cell_origin (xyzrender.types.CellData attribute)
  • CellData (class in xyzrender.types)
  • cmap_palette (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cmap_range (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cmap_symm (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • cmap_unlabeled (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • collect_surf_overrides() (in module xyzrender.config)
  • Color (class in xyzrender.types)
  • color (xyzrender.types.DensParams attribute)
    • (xyzrender.types.NCIParams attribute)
    • (xyzrender.types.VectorArrow attribute)
  • color_mode (xyzrender.types.NCIParams attribute)
  • color_overrides (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • colors (xyzrender.api.EnsembleFrames attribute), [1]
  • conformer_graphs (xyzrender.api.EnsembleFrames attribute), [1]
  • cube_data (xyzrender.api.Molecule attribute)

D

  • darken() (xyzrender.types.Color method)
  • DASHED (xyzrender.types.BondStyle attribute)
  • dens_color (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

  • dens_cutoff (xyzrender.types.NCIParams attribute)
  • dens_isovalue (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • DensParams (class in xyzrender.types)
  • dof (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • dof_strength (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • DOTTED (xyzrender.types.BondStyle attribute)
  • dpi (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • draw_on_top (xyzrender.types.VectorArrow attribute)

  • ensemble (xyzrender.api.Molecule attribute)

  • fixed_center (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • fixed_span (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

  • flat_mo (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • fog (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • fog_strength (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • font_size (xyzrender.types.VectorArrow attribute)
  • from_hex() (xyzrender.types.Color class method)
  • from_hls() (xyzrender.types.Color static method)
  • from_int() (xyzrender.types.Color class method)
  • from_str() (xyzrender.types.Color class method)

  • g (xyzrender.types.Color attribute)
  • GIFResult (class in xyzrender.types)
  • gradient (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • graph (xyzrender.api.Molecule attribute)

  • hex (xyzrender.types.Color property)
  • hide_bonds (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

  • highlight_indices (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)

  • hull_colors (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
  • hull_edge_width_ratio (xyzrender.types.RenderConfig attribute)
